---
title: "Multivariable calculus: Exercises"
toc: true
---

# 15 Gradients

1. Attempt as many of problems 1-21 odd, 49-53 odd, and 69-73 odd in [this](./text/14.4.pdf){target="_blank"} file. The solutions are [here](./text/14.4-sol.pdf){target="_blank"}.

2. Attempt as many of problem 1-17 odd and 25-29 odd in [this](./text/14.5.pdf){target="_blank"} file. The solutions are [here](./text/14.5-sol.pdf){target="_blank"}.
